testcase.name: runScenario["Execute complete workflow for Cabs, Gift Cards, and Hotels", "MakeMyTrip End-to-End Travel Validation"](1)

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //span[text()='Gift Cards']' (tried for 3 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)

testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //span[text()='Gift Cards']' testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Execute complete workflow for Cabs, Gift Cards, and Hotels # src/test/resources/features/TravelBooking.feature:8 [Hooks] Browser started (stealth mode). Home tab ID: B42FEBA669D0754084BA6F857A145905 [HomePage] Closed login modal. [TravelSteps] Home page loaded. Given User is on MakeMyTrip Home Page # stepDefinitions.TravelSteps.user_is_on_home() [CabPage] Cabs tab clicked. When User navigates to Cabs page # stepDefinitions.TravelSteps.user_navigates_to_cabs_page() [CabPage] Clicking FROM field... [CabPage] Typed FROM: Delhi [CabPage] Delhi suggestion clicked. [CabPage] Clicking TO field... [CabPage] Typed TO: Manali [CabPage] Manali suggestion clicked. And User enters "Delhi" as From location and "Manali,Himachal Pradesh" as To location # stepDefinitions.TravelSteps.user_enters_locations(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) [CabPage] Opening date picker... [CabPage] Month reached: June 2026 [CabPage] Date clicked → Wed Jun 10 2026 And User selects departure date "June" "2026" # stepDefinitions.TravelSteps.user_selects_departure_date(java.lang.String,java.lang.String) [TravelSteps] Time to select: 10 hr, 30 min [CabPage] Opening Pickup-Time picker... [CabPage] Hour clicked: 10 [CabPage] Minute clicked: 30 [CabPage] APPLY clicked. And User selects pickup time "10:30 AM" and clicks Apply # stepDefinitions.TravelSteps.user_selects_pickup_time(java.lang.String) [CabPage] Clicking SEARCH button... And User clicks Search # stepDefinitions.TravelSteps.user_clicks_search() [CabPage] Waiting for results page to load... [CabPage] Results page check: Expected condition failed: waiting for presence of element located by: By.xpath: //*[contains(@class,'cabDetailsCard') or contains(@class,'cab-card')] (tried for 25 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) | Current URL: https://www.makemytrip.com/cabs/listing?fromCity=%7B%22pincode%22%3A%22110010%22%2C%22country%22%3A%22India%22%2C%22address%22%3A%22Delhi%20cantt%20railway%20Junction%2C%20Kirby%20Place%2C%20Delhi%20Cantonment%2C%20New%20Delhi%2C%20Delhi%2C%20India%22%2C%22city%22%3A%22New%20Delhi%22%2C%22secondary_text%22%3A%22%20Delhi%20Cantonment%2C%20New%20Delhi%2C%20Delhi%20110010%2C%20India%22%2C%22latitude%22%3A28.6109026%2C%22is_airport%22%3Afalse%2C%22city_code%22%3A%22NewDelhi%22%2C%22label%22%3Anull%2C%22country_code%22%3A%22IN%22%2C%22is_city%22%3Afalse%2C%22google_city%22%3Anull%2C%22locusV2Id%22%3A%22CTDEL%22%2C%22name%22%3Anull%2C%22mainText%22%3Anull%2C%22main_text%22%3A%22Kirby%20Place%22%2C%22state%22%3A%22Delhi%22%2C%22locusV2Type%22%3A%22CITY%22%2C%22place_id%22%3A%22ChIJe511hdAdDTkRy4vPSu2VEQk%22%2C%22city_type%22%3Anull%2C%22longitude%22%3A77.1149472%7D&toCity=%7B%22pincode%22%3Anull%2C%22country%22%3A%22India%22%2C%22address%22%3A%22Manali%2C%20Himachal%20Pradesh%2C%20India%22%2C%22city%22%3A%22Manali%22%2C%22secondary_text%22%3A%22%20Himachal%20Pradesh%2C%20India%22%2C%22latitude%22%3A32.2431872%2C%22is_airport%22%3Afalse%2C%22city_code%22%3A%22KUU%22%2C%22label%22%3Anull%2C%22country_code%22%3A%22IN%22%2C%22is_city%22%3Atrue%2C%22google_city%22%3Anull%2C%22locusV2Id%22%3A%22CTKUU%22%2C%22name%22%3Anull%2C%22mainText%22%3Anull%2C%22main_text%22%3A%22Manali%22%2C%22state%22%3A%22Himachal%20Pradesh%22%2C%22locusV2Type%22%3A%22CITY%22%2C%22place_id%22%3A%22ChIJP9A_FgiHBDkRzXZQvg6oKYE%22%2C%22city_type%22%3Anull%2C%22longitude%22%3A77.1891761%7D&tripType=OW&departDate=10-06-2026&pickupTime=10:30&intlFlow=false [TravelSteps] WARNING: Results page may not have loaded correctly. [TravelSteps] Current URL: https://www.makemytrip.com/cabs/listing?fromCity=%7B%22pincode%22%3A%22110010%22%2C%22country%22%3A%22India%22%2C%22address%22%3A%22Delhi%20cantt%20railway%20Junction%2C%20Kirby%20Place%2C%20Delhi%20Cantonment%2C%20New%20Delhi%2C%20Delhi%2C%20India%22%2C%22city%22%3A%22New%20Delhi%22%2C%22secondary_text%22%3A%22%20Delhi%20Cantonment%2C%20New%20Delhi%2C%20Delhi%20110010%2C%20India%22%2C%22latitude%22%3A28.6109026%2C%22is_airport%22%3Afalse%2C%22city_code%22%3A%22NewDelhi%22%2C%22label%22%3Anull%2C%22country_code%22%3A%22IN%22%2C%22is_city%22%3Afalse%2C%22google_city%22%3Anull%2C%22locusV2Id%22%3A%22CTDEL%22%2C%22name%22%3Anull%2C%22mainText%22%3Anull%2C%22main_text%22%3A%22Kirby%20Place%22%2C%22state%22%3A%22Delhi%22%2C%22locusV2Type%22%3A%22CITY%22%2C%22place_id%22%3A%22ChIJe511hdAdDTkRy4vPSu2VEQk%22%2C%22city_type%22%3Anull%2C%22longitude%22%3A77.1149472%7D&toCity=%7B%22pincode%22%3Anull%2C%22country%22%3A%22India%22%2C%22address%22%3A%22Manali%2C%20Himachal%20Pradesh%2C%20India%22%2C%22city%22%3A%22Manali%22%2C%22secondary_text%22%3A%22%20Himachal%20Pradesh%2C%20India%22%2C%22latitude%22%3A32.2431872%2C%22is_airport%22%3Afalse%2C%22city_code%22%3A%22KUU%22%2C%22label%22%3Anull%2C%22country_code%22%3A%22IN%22%2C%22is_city%22%3Atrue%2C%22google_city%22%3Anull%2C%22locusV2Id%22%3A%22CTKUU%22%2C%22name%22%3Anull%2C%22mainText%22%3Anull%2C%22main_text%22%3A%22Manali%22%2C%22state%22%3A%22Himachal%20Pradesh%22%2C%22locusV2Type%22%3A%22CITY%22%2C%22place_id%22%3A%22ChIJP9A_FgiHBDkRzXZQvg6oKYE%22%2C%22city_type%22%3Anull%2C%22longitude%22%3A77.1891761%7D&tripType=OW&departDate=10-06-2026&pickupTime=10:30&intlFlow=false [TravelSteps] Screenshot: /Users/shoebiqbal/Desktop/cucumberBDD/cucumberBDD-MakeMyTrip/MakeMyTrip_BDD_Project/target/Screenshots/CabList_AfterSearch.png [CabPage] Applying SUV filter... And User selects the Wedding Gift Card # stepDefinitions.TravelSteps.user_selects_wedding_card() And User enters sender details "Sathvik", "8709390380", "invalid-email@@test" # stepDefinitions.TravelSteps.user_enters_sender_details(java.lang.String,java.lang.String,java.lang.String) Then User clicks Buy Now and captures a screenshot # stepDefinitions.TravelSteps.user_clicks_buy_now_and_captures_screenshot() And User checks maximum adult capacity in Hotels # stepDefinitions.TravelSteps.hotel_logic() Then User takes a screenshot # stepDefinitions.TravelSteps.take_final_screenshot()

[Hooks] FAILED: Execute complete workflow for Cabs, Gift Cards, and Hotels [Hooks] Browser closed.
testcase.system-err: [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Using chromedriver 147.0.7727.57 (resolved driver for Chrome 147) [main] INFO io.github.bonigarcia.wdm.WebDriverManager - Exporting webdriver.chrome.driver as /Users/shoebiqbal/.cache/selenium/chromedriver/mac-arm64/147.0.7727.57/chromedriver Apr 19, 2026 12:22:36 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 Apr 19, 2026 12:22:36 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.56. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.20.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
